# AnimeVocab — llms.txt
# https://animevocab.com

> AnimeVocab helps people learn Japanese from anime they already watch. Free Chrome extension with romaji-first vocabulary cards, spaced repetition, and Listening Mode for Netflix/Crunchyroll when Japanese subtitles are missing. Also includes Manga Studio — a free AI manga maker for writing and publishing original manga chapters.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://animevocab.com/): Learn Japanese from anime — Chrome extension landing
- [Free Japanese anime extension](https://animevocab.com/free-japanese-anime-extension): Free Chrome extension hub (no credit card)
- [Manga Studio](https://animevocab.com/studio): Free AI manga maker — draft chapters, edit dialogue, redraw panels
- [AI Manga Maker guide](https://animevocab.com/ai-manga-maker): SEO hub for create manga online free
- [Manga Gallery](https://animevocab.com/gallery): Public manga published by learners
- [Blog](https://animevocab.com/blog): Guides on anime Japanese learning, tools, SRS, shadowing
- [RSS feed](https://animevocab.com/feed.xml)

## Learning guides

- [Learn Japanese with anime (2026)](https://animevocab.com/learn-japanese-with-anime): Tool comparison and ranking
- [Learn Japanese on Crunchyroll](https://animevocab.com/learn-japanese-crunchyroll): Without Japanese subtitles
- [Learn Japanese on Netflix anime](https://animevocab.com/learn-japanese-netflix-anime)
- [Learn Japanese on YouTube anime](https://animevocab.com/learn-japanese-youtube-anime)
- [Learn Japanese on Disney+](https://animevocab.com/learn-japanese-disney-plus)
- [Best anime to learn Japanese](https://animevocab.com/best-anime-to-learn-japanese)
- [Romaji Japanese learning](https://animevocab.com/romaji-japanese-learning)
- [Learn Japanese with manga](https://animevocab.com/learn-japanese-manga)
- [Anime spaced repetition](https://animevocab.com/anime-spaced-repetition)

## Tool comparisons

- [vs Language Reactor](https://animevocab.com/vs-language-reactor)
- [vs Migaku](https://animevocab.com/vs-migaku)
- [vs Lexirise](https://animevocab.com/vs-lexirise)
- [vs Trancy](https://animevocab.com/vs-trancy)
- [vs ManabiDojo](https://animevocab.com/vs-manabidojo)
- [vs Animelon](https://animevocab.com/vs-animelon)
- [vs Lingoku](https://animevocab.com/vs-lingoku)
- [vs YumeGo](https://animevocab.com/vs-yumego)
- [vs asbplayer](https://animevocab.com/vs-asbplayer)
- [vs Wordy](https://animevocab.com/vs-wordy)

## High-intent blog posts

- [Best apps to learn Japanese with anime (2026)](https://animevocab.com/blog/best-apps-learn-japanese-anime-2026)

- [Yomitan for anime alternatives](https://animevocab.com/blog/yomitan-anime-alternative-video-immersion-2026)
- [Kitsunekko subtitles guide](https://animevocab.com/blog/kitsunekko-subtitles-anime-2026)
- [Jimaku vs Listening Mode](https://animevocab.com/blog/jimaku-crunchyroll-subtitles-vs-listening-mode)
- [Substital on Crunchyroll](https://animevocab.com/blog/substital-crunchyroll-japanese-subtitles-2026)

## Product facts

- Extension: local-first, open source, romaji-first cards, one word per subtitle line
- Listening Mode: real-time transcription of tab audio for sites without JP subs
- Manga Studio: AI script + per-panel art, editable dialogue bubbles, sketch redraw, public gallery
- Word Manga: 4-panel stories forced to use the learner's target vocabulary
- Pricing: core learning loop free; Pro for hosted Listening Mode without OpenAI API key
